case_title: FLORIN DAIRE VS. EVAN M SORNSTEIN

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-18-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-16-2006 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAIRE, FLORIN AS TO DEFENDANT SORNSTEIN, EVAN M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-01-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-30-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-17-2006

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST FLORIN DAIRE, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-18-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-02-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DEBORAH NEVILLE CSR	703. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST FLORIN DAIRE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-16-2006, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-31-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN LEE, CSR# 4280 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-01-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-16-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-16-2007 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR#2031. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Jan-16-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/16/2007 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee, CSR# 4280 (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-16-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville CSR 703. (212)
